description: AzukiCoin (AZUKI) is the FIRST ATC-20 Memorial Coin on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — launched to honor Azuki, the internet’s most beloved spinning cat who passed away on September 9, 2025. Blending web3 innovation with heartfelt remembrance, AZUKI stands as a symbol of loyalty, cuteness, and the eternal spin that once delighted millions. Azuki the cat may be gone, but in Atlantis Kingdom, she spins forever.
name: AzukiCoin
